evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,5000)); MOS.abrirModalPrecioRapido('IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1500)); r.filas=document.querySelectorAll('.qp-pres-card').length; r.chips=document.querySelectorAll('.qp-mode-chip').length; r.btnLabel=(document.getElementById('qpBtnLabel')||{}).textContent; r.membreteToggle=!!document.getElementById('qpMembretesSw'); return r; })()
